info.title: SmsHttps API
info.description:
Swagger definition for xStore Web Services


Request Parameters (Required)

CN= Session ID received after login
DN= The Device Name is used allow only web services with this namespace
BW= Client browser ID (IE, FF, CH, OP)

SessionCN.name: CN
SessionCN.description: Session token obtained after login (CN= value).

DN.name: DN
DN.description: The Device Name is used allow only web services with this namespace

BW.name: BW
BW.description: Client browser ID (IE, FF, CH, OP)

tags.name: Auxiliaries
tags.description: List of stores, departments, categories, subdepartments, recipes, family code and classification

tags.name: Checkout
tags.description: Basket and Checkout. List of orders.

get.summary: Login as Anonymous (Guest)
get.description: Logs in a customer as anonymous. Request Parameters

parameters.name: LOGIN_PRM
parameters.description: Login parameters, version and language etc.

200.description:
Loads the session params and values.
Loads the communication preferences of the customer. Load some items from the profile table used in the application. Loads the default route options. Returns customer balances. Returns the transaction mode.

get.summary: Login as user with an account
get.description: Log in customer as with a username and password. Request Parameters

parameters.name: LOGIN_PRM
parameters.description: Login parameters, version and language etc.

200.description:
Loads the session params and values.
Loads the communication preferences of the customer.
Load some items from the profile table used in the application.
Loads the default route options.
Return balances.

Request Parameters
